chapter_title.en: Chapter 44 – Penalty (Hadd) of the children regarding the theft

text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ أُتِيَ عَلِيٌّ ( عليه السلام ) بِغُلَامٍ قَدْ سَرَقَ فَطَرَّفَ أَصَابِعَهُ ثُمَّ قَالَ أَمَا لَئِنْ عُدْتَ لَأَقْطَعَنَّهَا ثُمَّ قَالَ أَمَا إِنَّهُ مَا عَمِلَهُ إِلَّا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ أَنَا .

en.hubeali: Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Sama’at, from someone else, from his companion, from Aban Bin Usman, from Zurara who said,

‘I heard Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘They came to Ali<sup>asws</sup> with a boy who had stolen. So he<sup>asws</sup> scratched his fingers, then said: ‘But, if you were to repeat, I would cut these’. Then he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘But it has not been done except by Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> and myself<sup>asws</sup>’.
